videos.headline: Alabama gets game-sealing INT to secure big road win vs. Missouri
videos.description: Dijon Lee Jr. gets a massive interception to wrap up Alabama's win over Missouri.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama gets game-sealing INT to secure big road win vs. Missouri) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama Crimson Tide vs. Missouri Tigers: Full Highlights
videos.description: Alabama Crimson Tide vs. Missouri Tigers: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama Crimson Tide vs. Missouri Tigers: Full Highlights) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: No. 8 Alabama holds off No. 14 Mizzou in epic battle
videos.description: Quarterback Ty Simpson throws for three touchdowns and the Crimson Tide hang on for a huge 27-17 SEC road victory, knocking the Tigers from the ranks of the unbeaten.

videos.headline: Missouri strikes quickly with Brett Norfleet's 26-yard touchdown
videos.description: Beau Pribula finds Brett Norfleet downfield for the 26-yard touchdown pass.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Missouri strikes quickly with Brett Norfleet's 26-yard touchdown) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama answers back with Kevin Riley's 6-yard TD
videos.description: Ty Simpson finds Kevin Riley for the 6-yard touchdown pass to tie the score at 7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama answers back with Kevin Riley's 6-yard TD) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Horton's 16-yard TD catch puts Alabama on top
videos.description: Ty Simpson connects with Isaiah Horton for a 16-yard touchdown pass to give Alabama the lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Horton's 16-yard TD catch puts Alabama on top) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Marvin Burks Jr. ejected for targeting
videos.description: Alabama's Derek Meadows injured after targeting penalty from Missouri's Marvin Burks Jr.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Marvin Burks Jr. ejected for targeting) 2025/10/11 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Conor Talty makes 46-yard field goal) 2025/10/11 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Robert Meyer makes 35-yard field goal) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Beau Pribula finds the end zone for 5-yard TD
videos.description: Beau Pribula fakes the handoff and rushes into the end zone to tie the score at 17 for Missouri.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Beau Pribula finds the end zone for 5-yard TD) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Zion Young gets the strip sack on Ty Simpson
videos.description: Zion Young punches the ball away from Ty Simpson and Missouri recovers deep in Alabama territory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Zion Young gets the strip sack on Ty Simpson) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama offensive lineman Kadyn Proctor rumbles his way to a 1st down
videos.description: Kadyn Proctor takes the direct snap and hurdles his way to an Alabama first down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama offensive lineman Kadyn Proctor rumbles his way to a 1st down) 2025/10/11 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Conor Talty kicks 22-yard field goal) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bray Hubbard comes up with the interception for Alabama
videos.description: Bray Hubbard picks off Beau Pribula to give Alabama the ball back in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bray Hubbard comes up with the interception for Alabama) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jam Miller leaves the game after a hard hit
videos.description: Alabama's Jam Miller is hit hard on the sideline and exits the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jam Miller leaves the game after a hard hit) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Missouri tries fake punt, fails to convert
videos.description: Missouri attempts a fake punt inside their own territory but Alabama's defense comes up with a huge stop.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Missouri tries fake punt, fails to convert) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Simpson finds Hill for 1-yard TD
videos.description: Ty Simpson connects with Daniel Hill in the end zone for a 1-yard passing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Simpson finds Hill for 1-yard TD) 2025/10/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Olugbode hauls in 3-yard TD pass from Pribula
videos.description: Beau Pribula finds Donovan Olugbode in the end zone for a 3-yard Missouri touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Olugbode hauls in 3-yard TD pass from Pribula) 2025/10/11 ESHEET
